basic_details.job_title: DCPU Ranipet Accountant Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.organization_name: District Child Protection Unit Ranipet (DCPU Ranipet)
basic_details.short_information: District Child Protection Unit Ranipet (DCPU Ranipet) Accountant Notification 2026 has been released on the official website https://ranipet.nic.in. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the DCPU Ranipet Accountant Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: Graduate in Commerce / Mathematics degree from a recognized university, At least 1 year experience of working in desired field, Computer Skills & Command on Tally
qualification.details: Graduate in Commerce / Mathematics degree from a recognized university. At least 1 year of experience in the desired field. Computer Skills & Command on Tally.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for DCPU Ranipet Accountant Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: https://ranipet.nic.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 25-06-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

all_official_links.label: Download DCPU Ranipet Accountant Job 2026 Notification PDF

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the DCPU Ranipet Accountant recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the offline application for the DCPU Ranipet Accountant post is 25th June 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well in advance to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Accountant post?
faq.answer: To be eligible for the Accountant position, candidates must hold a Graduate degree in Commerce or Mathematics from a recognized university. Additionally, at least one year of relevant experience and proficiency in Tally are required.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Accountant position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Accountant post is 42 years. Specific age relaxations for reserved categories may be mentioned in the official notification.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Accountant role?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Accountant position will receive a monthly salary of Rs. 18,536/-.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, as per the provided information, there is no application fee for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q6. How can I apply for the DCPU Ranipet Accountant job?
faq.answer: The application process is offline. Candidates need to download the application form from the official website, fill it out, attach necessary documents, and send it to the address mentioned in the notification before the last date.

faq.question: Q7. What is the job type for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The recruitment for the Accountant post is on a contractual basis.

faq.question: Q8. Which organization is conducting this recruitment?
faq.answer: This recruitment is being conducted by the District Child Protection Unit Ranipet (DCPU Ranipet).

faq.question: Q9. How many vacancies are available for the Accountant post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Accountant post in the District Child Protection Unit Ranipet.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: The official notification and application form can be downloaded from the official website of DCPU Ranipet, which is https://ranipet.nic.in.
